repo_prior_art.cite: parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: inclusion/equality boundary at eta=0; parent excluded as upgrade baseline

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021: common-identifying-restriction LP/VAR equivalence, including sign restrictions

repo_prior_art.cite: none beyond parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1, which only posed eta=0 independent-shock cumulant contact

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021/GourierouxMonfortRenne2017/LanneMeitzSaikkonen2017/LanneLiuLuoto2026: closest papers cover common-restriction equivalence or non-Gaussian SVAR identification, not an LP/support eta-leakage frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: none beyond parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1 two-shock eta=0 witness; upgrade adds eta-leakage residual and reflection components

published_prior_art.cite: Guay2021/AriasRubioRamirezWaggoner2018: higher-moment rank and sign-zero rotation algorithms, not an LP-support-angle leakage residual formula

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Assumption primitive-rank gives uniqueness only on the relevant connected component, but eta_w^dagger is defined over all LP maximizers across O(n); the iff frontier needs a global exposed-maximizer/component-minimizer hypothesis or a componentwise statement.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a global exposed-support assumption: Q_w is the unique LP maximizer across all O(n) components, or every other exposed component has off-diagonal residual at least the stated eta_w^dagger(P).
Make Conjecture 2 genuinely closed-form by writing the rotation and reflection component coefficients separately and giving the explicit quartic polynomial residual in phi.
Add a boundary corollary showing exactly how eta_w^dagger(P)=0, finite positive, and +infty partition common contact, strict separation, and diagonal-contact infeasibility.

recommended_next_step: Patch Conjecture 1 and Assumption primitive-rank with a global component condition, then rerun Stage -0.5.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The proposal strictly widens the parent eta=0 independent-shock cumulant-diagonalization corner to eta-bounded off-diagonal co-kurtosis leakage and includes the mandatory eta=0 parent reduction.
